name: Paytronix Restaurant & Retail Loyalty API
what_it_does: Paytronix REST API for restaurant and retail loyalty and guest engagement platform. Enables AI agents to manage loyalty program enrollment and points/rewards tracking, handle gift card issuance and redemption, retrieve customer visit and spend analytics, manage targeted marketing campaign data, access mobile app and digital wallet integration, handle online ordering loyalty integration, retrieve A/B test and engagement experiment data, and connect guest intelligence data with POS and CRM systems.
use_cases: Managing loyalty program membership and points from restaurant engagement agents
Processing gift card issuance and balance tracking from payment automation agents
Retrieving customer visit frequency and spend analytics from retention agents
Integrating loyalty data with POS systems from restaurant operations agents
not_for: Non-food service retail without restaurant-specific loyalty workflows
Enterprise retail without restaurant and hospitality focus
Simple rewards without multi-tier loyalty and gift card management
best_when: A restaurant chain, fast casual brand, or retail operator using Paytronix wants AI agents to automate loyalty enrollment, points management, gift card processing, and targeted guest marketing.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Guest dining preferences and visit history data is sensitive. Loyalty program data combined with purchase behavior creates detailed consumer profiles. Automated marketing must comply with CAN-SPAM and TCPA. Gift card fraud prevention requires careful automation.

auth.notes: Paytronix uses API key and OAuth 2.0 for API access. Merchant-level credentials with loyalty, gift card, and analytics scopes. Developer portal with API documentation. POS integration partnerships. Webhooks for real-time loyalty events.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — restaurant loyalty enterprise pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-location and per-guest enterprise pricing; annual contracts
pricing.notes: Newton, Massachusetts. Founded 2001. Major restaurant loyalty platform. Used by 1,800+ restaurant and retail brands. Processes 4B+ interactions annually. Clients include Panera, Potbelly, and Papa Gino's. Competes with Punchh and Thanx for restaurant loyalty. Strong predictive analytics and A/B testing.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Guest dining behavior and purchase history creates detailed consumer profiles
No public MCP server — OAuth2 and API key with developer portal
Gift card fraud prevention — automated gift card issuance requires fraud controls
Loyalty point automation must handle expiration and tier transitions correctly
TCPA compliance for mobile push and SMS marketing automation
POS integration is the source of truth for visit data — API returns processed loyalty data, not raw POS
agent_readiness.security_notes: Guest loyalty and payment data. PCI-DSS, SOC2. OAuth2 + API key. US data residency. TCPA for mobile marketing.

security_score_components.security_notes: Guest loyalty and payment data. PCI-DSS, SOC2. OAuth2 + API key. US data residency. Gift card fraud prevention.
